content.text:
<timestamp>Friday, May 15, 2026, 1:58 PM (UTC+8)</timestamp>
<user_query>
I need to analyze product pages for Sony, Samsung, and Huawei headphone products to extract design patterns for a Cursor Skill that generates product page HTML.

## Task

Fetch the following product pages and for EACH page extract: page type, hero section (headline, layout), section structure with headlines, typography observations, color palette, layout patterns, CTA patterns, compare tables, FAQ structure, copy style.

### Sony
1. https://electronics.sony.com/audio/headphones/headband/p/wh1000xm6-b (WH-1000XM6 - flagship)
2. https://electronics.sony.com/audio/headphones/truly-wireless/p/wf1000xm5-b (WF-1000XM5 - flagship earbuds)
3. https://www.sony.com/en/headphones/wh-1000xm6 (alternative URL if above fails)

### Samsung
1. https://www.samsung.com/us/mobile-audio/galaxy-buds3-pro/ (Galaxy Buds 3 Pro)
2. https://www.samsung.com/us/mobile-audio/all-mobile-audio/ (category page, try if above fails)
3. https://www.samsung.com/us/smartphones/galaxy-buds/ (alternative)

### Huawei
1. https://consumer.huawei.com/en/headphones/freebuds-pro-3/ (FreeBuds Pro 3)
2. https://consumer.huawei.com/en/headphones/freeclip/ (FreeClip)

For each brand, analyze:
1. **Visual identity**: What's the dominant color scheme? Is it dark/light dominant? What accent colors?
2. **Layout system**: Full-width sections? Contained? Split columns? Card grids?
3. **Typography**: Font family (if detectable), headline size hierarchy, text alignment
4. **Hero pattern**: Centered? Left-aligned? Product image placement?
5. **Feature sections**: How are features presented? Image-text alternation? Cards? Full-bleed images?
6. **Purchase elements**: Is it combined or separate? Where's the buy button?
7. **Copy tone**: Technical? Emotional? Aspirational? Data-heavy?
8. **Unique design elements**: Anything distinctive about this brand's web design?

After analyzing all pages, provide a **style grouping recommendation**:
- Which brands have similar visual styles that could be merged into one "style option"?
- Which brands are distinct enough to warrant their own style option?
- Compare to the 4 existing styles: Shokz (B&W minimalist), Apple (white cinematic), Beats (dark bold), Bose (premium warm)

Save findings to `sony-samsung-huawei-patterns.md` in the workspace root at `c:\Users\016551\OneDrive\Desktop\IWE\`.
</user_query>

The user wants me to fetch multiple product pages from Sony, Samsung, and Huawei to analyze their design patterns. Let me start by fetching these pages and then analyze them. I'll use WebFetch for each URL.

Let me fetch the pages in parallel where possible.

Huawei FreeBuds Pro 3 returned minimal content. Let me try alternative URLs to get more data.

I got content from most pages, but Huawei FreeBuds Pro 3 returned very little. Let me also try the Sony alternative URL and search for more Samsung details. Let me also try to get more visual/design information by fetching the alternative Sony page and the Samsung buy page.

Good, I got more data. Let me now search for additional design insights about these product pages to supplement the fetched content.

Good, I got more data from Huawei FreeBuds Pro 4 (which is the newer model). Let me also do some web searches for more detailed design analysis of these product pages to supplement what the fetches returned.

input.search_term: Sony WH-1000XM6 product page design layout 2025 web design analysis
input.explanation: Searching for design analysis of Sony's product page to supplement content fetch

input.search_term: Samsung Galaxy Buds3 Pro product page web design layout dark theme 2024
input.explanation: Searching for Samsung's product page design patterns

input.search_term: Huawei FreeBuds Pro product page web design style color scheme layout
input.explanation: Searching for Huawei's product page design patterns

content.text:
Let me get the richer marketing-style pages for deeper design analysis.

Let me get more design details by fetching the Sony Australia page (which has the marketing/brand page format) and the Huawei FreeBuds Pro 5 page, and Samsung Design page for more detail.
